.. Fivedreg Interpolator documentation master file.

Welcome to Fivedreg Interpolator's documentation!
=================================================

A research-grade system for learning and serving neural network models 
that interpolate 5-dimensional numerical datasets.

   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Getting Started:
